race.comment: SORELL EAGLES (5) wasn't really fancied on debut but sat handy and fought on well to finish a close-up fourth. Can only be improved and looks suited by the extra ground. Can measure up. TIMELY NEEDS (6) was beaten for speed over 1100m off a long break and ran on well to place. Will strip much fitter for it and looks tough to stop. CROWNED BEAU (2) is a gelding by Yulong Prince from Pink Beau on debut. Ran sixth at recent trial. Blinkers on and worth watching for any market moves. MISS STRAT (10) was well in the market on debut and while finishing sixth wasn't far from the winner. Has winning claims with the benefit of that run.
